name: video-frames
tagline: ClawHub (133★): Extract frames or short clips from videos using ffmpeg.
verdict: Strong marks across security and quality — genuinely solid execution. Weak spots are cosmetic: no version or changelog to track drift, the Homebrew install isn't version-pinned (low risk, it's a known formula), and there's no explicit 'use this when...' trigger phrase.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
Install source is the standard Homebrew formula for a well-known package (not a shady registry or typosquat), but no version is pinned — per rubric, a well-known package installed
States what the skill does but has no explicit 'use when' / trigger phrasing.
